JJob Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Supervise, train, and mentor front-of-house and back-of-house staff to ensure optimal performance.

	Ensure all guests receive prompt, professional, and courteous service.

	Monitor the dining area to ensure a pleasant and safe environment for all guests.
	Oversee daily restaurant operations, including opening and closing procedures.
	Ensure all food and beverages are prepared and presented to the highest quality standards.
	Maintain a clean, organized, and safe restaurant environment, adhering to health and safety regulations.
	Assist in managing the restaurant&rsquo;s budget, monitoring daily sales, and preparing daily and monthly reports.
	Control costs by minimizing waste and optimizing inventory usage.
	Provide ongoing training and development opportunities for team members.
	Evaluate staff performance and provide constructive feedback to promote growth.
	Enforce company policies, including attendance, dress code, and workplace conduct.
	Monitor inventory levels and report shortages or maintenance issues to management.
	Ensure strict adherence to food safety, hygiene, and health regulations.


Qualifications


	Minimum OND / HND / Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Hospitality, Business, or a related field preferred.
	2&ndash;3 years of experience in restaurant supervision or front-of-house management.
	Strong leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to manage multiple tasks and resolve conflicts under pressure.
	Customer-focused mindset with attention to detail.
	Knowledge of food safety, hygiene, and operational standards.
	Proficiency in POS systems and basic administrative tasks.


Compensation, Scope of Work, and Benefits


	Salary: N150,000 per month
	Days of Work: Monday &ndash; Saturday
	Working Hours: 7:00 AM &ndash; 7:00 PM
	Health Maintenance Organization (HMO) coverage


Method of Application

  "description": "Custom Gifts &amp; Designs Limited is Nigeria&#39;s premier destination for gifting services -integrating flower shop, gift store, kiddies giftware, party favors, and a balloon shop.


Custom Gifts &amp; Designs brand is recognized as a leading departmental gift store in Nigeria, offering a diverse range of gifting services and products. We strive to provide exceptional experiences for our customers, making us a preferred destination for all gifting needs in Nigeria and beyond.



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Receiving &amp; Warehouse Lead

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time



Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and organized Inventory Receiving &amp; Warehouse Lead to oversee all incoming inventory, warehouse operations, and stock management activities.
	The ideal candidate will ensure accurate receiving, storage, tracking, and distribution of products while maintaining warehouse efficiency, inventory accuracy, and operational excellence.


Key Responsibilities


	Receive goods and materials from suppliers
	Verify quantities, specifications, and product condition upon delivery
	Assign and maintain product codes (SKUs) and inventory records
	Ensure all received products are accurately entered into the inventory management system
	Organize warehouse storage locations for maximum efficiency
	Conduct routine stock counts and inventory reconciliation
	Monitor stock movement and report discrepancies
	Maintain warehouse cleanliness, organization, and safety standards
	Coordinate with procurement and operations teams regarding stock availability
	Prepare inventory and warehouse reports as required
	Supervise warehouse activities and ensure adherence to company procedures
	Ensure compliance with inventory control policies and warehouse best practices.


Educational Qualifications
Applicants must possess any of the following:


	SSCE
	NCE
	ND.


Requirements:


	1 - 3 years of experience in Inventory Management, Warehouse Operations, Stock Control, or a related field
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Excellent leadership and team coordination abilities
	High level of attention to detail and accuracy
	Strong organizational and time-management skills
	Ability to work independently and under minimal supervision
	Good analytical and problem-solving skills.


Technical Skills:


	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook)
	Experience using ERP Systems or Inventory Management Software
	Ability to generate inventory reports and maintain accurate records
	Knowledge of warehouse operations and stock management procedures.
	ND.


Preferred Qualities:


	Strong leadership qualities
	Integrity and accountability
	Excellent record-keeping skills
	Ability to work under pressure
	Commitment to workplace safety and operational excellence
	Proactive and results-oriented mindset.


Work Schedule:


	Full-Time Employment
	Monday &ndash; Saturday (as applicable to operational requirements)




Compensation &amp; Benefits


	N120,000 Monthly Salary
	Health Maintenance Organization (HMO) Coverage
	Performance-Based Bonuses
	Staff Transportation Support
	Career Growth and Development Opportunities
	Professional and Structured Work Environment.




Application Closing Date
Open Until Filled.



Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to: cgdbrandmanager@gmail.com using &quot;Inventory Receiving &amp; Warehouse Lead&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Motion Graphic Designer&nbsp;

Job Location: Lagos

Job Summary


	We seek thire a highly efficient and productive Motion Graphic Designer.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for efficient production of high-quality visual assets for print and digital projects, while aligning tthe company&rsquo;s corporate identity.
	Design works may include brochures, advertisements, graphic elements, exhibition booth displays, social media design, templates and cross-departmental designs.


Main Key Responsibilities


	Responsible for creating brand concepts internally, in order tpromote the company&rsquo;s vision, mission statement and brand values within the working core.

	Incorporating typography, visual effects, and sound design tenhance the overall impact and engagement of motion graphic content.

	Develop &amp; design graphics for corporate communications internally and externally e.g., press releases, adverts, social design creatives, marketing campaigns, etc.
	Support the brand positioning set by the management and generate creative ideas for improving the company&rsquo;s brand image.
	Up tdate with various design software tfulfil material production requests (including brochures, postcards, invitations, e-cards, and event catalogues).
	Create, review, edit video, audio, and image content for use within internal and external communication channels, liaising closely with the communications team tensure content is relevant and appropriate
	Produce multimedia content in various formats, including, but not limited to: video, podcasts, and infographics.
	Manage external graphic design suppliers including print supply companies tensure all required artwork is on budget and tthe required standard.
	Prepare audio/vidematerial and distribute via the company&rsquo;s website, intranet and tother platforms in the formats required.
	Develop graphics and layouts for product illustrations.
	Launch optimized online advertisements tincrease brand awareness.
	Provide support and back-up tthe other members of the team.
	Completion of other tasks as assigned by the supervisors in meeting the departmental objectives


Key Metrics


	Implementation of established corporate brand and digital guidelines.
	Meeting deadlines and managing time.
	Proactiveness, creative ability and distinctiveness of creative outputs.
	Detail-oriented work and collaboration with other business units.
	From ideation tclosing, marketing campaigns are executed successfully.


Qualification / Experience&nbsp;


	Minimum of BSc Degree
	Prior experience as a Motion Graphics Designer as well as a strong portfoliof sample projects.
	Candidates should possess a bachelor&rsquo;s degree with 3 &ndash; 5 years of work experience.
	A strong portfoliof graphic design, animation, and motion graphics work.
	Highly proficient computer skills, especially with Adobe Creative Suite applications (i.e., &nbsp; &nbsp;Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Premiere Pro, Adobe After Effects), any other design software
	Sound knowledge and demonstrable experience of creating and managing multimedia content in a range of formats.
	Knowledgeable of design practices such as brand development.
	Knowledge of videand audiproduction and editing skills.
	Experience of social media content creation.
	Broad knowledge of current digital communications tools and trends.
	Strong computer skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.


Competences:


	Well organised and structured with an eye for detail.
	Proactive self-starter with initiative.
	Research skills with the ability tidentify key media and technology trends and develop appropriate solutions.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills. Able tassimilate information clearly and prepare appropriate, clear, and concise multimedia content.
	Excellent time management skills with an ability tconsistently meet deadlines and manage a varied and demanding workload.
	Excellent interpersonal skills with a track record for collaborative working and confidently building and managing sustainable relationships at all level.

Financial Reporting Manager Job at Nexia Agbo Abel & Co




        
    

        
        Nexia Agbo Abel & Co. is a multi-skill and multi-discipline professional advisory firm committed to technical and professional excellence in the provision of services that are innovative, tailor-made and cost effective and accord with professional standards and guidelines issued by National and International reputable institutes to which it belongs. We are a Nigerian-owned, operated and managed firm.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Our firm is registered with the Corporate Affairs Commission of Nigeria as Chartered Accountants and is duly licensed by the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria and given permission to set up public practice in Nigeria. We are also registered with the Office of the Auditor General of the Federation. Nexia Agbo Abel & Co, with its proven local expertise, also has an enviable global reach as it is a member of Nexia International, a worldwide network of independent auditors, business advisers and consultants with offices in over one hundred countries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Financial Reporting Manager

Job Location: Abuja
Job type: Full-time

Role Summary


	The Financial reporting Manager will ensure the accurate, compliant, and timely preparation of financial reports in accordance with applicable accounting standards, regulatory requirements, and client-specific needs.


Duties & Responsibilities


	Oversees the preparation of financial statements (balance sheet, income statement, cash flow statement, and notes) for accuracy, completeness, and compliance in accordance with IFRS, GAAP, or other relevant frameworks.
	Ensure tall financial reports comply with legal, tax, and industry regulations.
	Facilitate all external audits by preparing documentation, responding to auditor queries, and ensuring audit readiness.
	Provide clients with technical accounting guidance/expert advice on complex accounting issues, such as revenue recognition, lease accounting, and financial instruments.
	Collaborate with internal and external stakeholders to clarify financial reporting matters.
	Implements and improve financial reporting processes and systems to enhance efficiency and compliance
	Plan and execute financial reports, sustainability reports, and integrated reporting.
	Ensure compliance with International Financial Reporting Standard(IFRS) and other reporting standards.
	Manage and mentor a team of reporting specialists, fostering a culture of excellence and continuous learning.
	Provide training on emerging trends in financial reporting, sustainability, and reporting.
	Identify opportunities to expand the firm’s service offerings in sustainability and integrated reporting.
	Ensure all engagements comply with relevant laws, regulations, and professional standards.
	Monitor changes in financial and sustainability reporting standards and communicate their impact to clients and the firm.


Minimum Qualifications


	Degree or HND in Accounting, Finance, Economics or any relevant field with a minimum of second class upper or upper credit.
	Minimum of seven (7+) years of experience in financial reporting, auditing, or assurance, with at least 3 years in a managerial role.
	Proven experience in sustainability reporting and assurance.
	Master's Degree in Business Administration
	Strong knowledge of IFRS, GAAP, ISA, and sustainability frameworks.
	Membership of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria or its equivalent.

General Manager (Business Operations & Commercial Leadership) Job at UnoCasa Limited




        
    

        
        Unocasa - Our client, a leading financial card manufacturing company, is recruiting suitbale candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: General Manager (Business Operations & Commercial Leadership)

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The General Manager will provide overall leadership and direction across all business functions, including operations, production, finance, sales & marketing, procurement, HR, and administration.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Support the CEO in executing the company’s strategic vision
	Drive organisational transformation and process optimisation
	Establish strong performance management systems
	Oversee production, operations, and supply chain functions
	Improve efficiency, cost management, and resource utilisation
	Ensure compliance with quality and regulatory standards
	Oversee budgeting, financial planning, and cost control
	Lead and mentor department heads across all functions
	Manage relationships with clients, vendors, regulators, and partners.


Requirements


	10–15 years of senior leadership experience (preferably in Manufacturing, FMCG, Industrial, or Financial Services Support)
	Bachelor’s degree in Business, Engineering, Finance, or related field
	MBA or relevant professional certification (an added advantage)
	Proven experience managing multi-functional business operations
	Strong financial and commercial acumen
	Demonstrated ability to scale or restructure businesses
	Excellent leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills
	Strategic thinker with strong execution capability.
